arts.ttl: Liverpool open talks for €60m wonderkid to replace Van Dijk
arts.sum: Liverpool have moved ahead of Real Madrid and Manchester United in the race to sign Bournemouth sensation Dean Huijsen this summer. Liverpool have now moved ahead of Man Utd and Real Madrid for Huijsen, with the Bournemouth wonderkid, who has a long list of suitors.

arts.ttl: 'Die for him' - Harvey Elliott shows true colours as he names Liverpool star 'world's best'
arts.sum: Harvey Elliott and Alisson Becker were both heroes of Liverpool's win in Paris, but the Reds midfielder insists the Brazilian goalkeeper is the one who deserves all the plaudits

arts.ttl: 'Turn into a nightmare' - French players warn PSG what they are in for after Liverpool claims
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain may be confident of overturning their Champions League deficit to Liverpool but Anfield may have other ideas

arts.ttl: Salah and Alexander-Arnold spat caught on camera
arts.sum: Two of Liverpool’s stars, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Mohamed Salah, were involved in a heated clash during training ahead of the crucial Champions League match against PSG on Tuesday at Anfield. Both Alexander-Arnold and Salah are among Liverpool’s biggest stars, yet neither has renewed their contract, despite their current deals expiring on June 30.

arts.ttl: Move for Liverpool player ‘extremely complicated’ – Transfer drama stirred again
arts.sum: Barcelona could be an option for Liverpool star Mohamed Salah next season, according to Sport. The Egypt international’s contract expires in June and it’s not yet clear where he’ll play next season. Last summer, Barcelona had looked at the Liverpool player and even approached him. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man United, Liverpool & Arsenal are closely monitoring 43 G/A winger
arts.sum: Barcelona’s Brazilian star Raphinha is being closely monitored by the biggest Premier League clubs, according to Caught Offside sources. In particular, Newcastle United, Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester United are closely following the 28-year-old winger’s successful performances in La Liga. arts.ttl: Liverpool vs PSG Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs PSG – Champions League match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool have a slender lead to protect tonight as they welcome Paris Saint-Germain to Anfield for the second leg of their round-of-16 Champions League matchup. In the first leg substitute Harvey Elliott scored the winner within a minute of entering the field to complete a smash and grab performance. arts.ttl: When could Liverpool seal Premier League title?
arts.sum: Liverpool's march to the Premier League title seems inevitable now after they increase their lead at the top of the table to 15 points. When could they be confirmed as champions?

arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembélé with best goals-per-game ratio of PSG’s QSI era
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembélé (27) has been on top form for Paris Saint-Germain throughout the 2025-26 campaign, leading Ligue 1 with 20 goals this season. The 2018 World Cup champion with Les…
